key.name: poll-interval-ms
key.description: How often to sample the cursor position, in milliseconds.

key.name: history-window-ms
key.description: Sliding time window used to detect wiggle gestures, in milliseconds.

key.name: min-reversals
key.description: Number of direction changes required to trigger cursor enlargement.

key.name: min-move-px
key.description: Minimum pixels per sample to count as intentional movement (jitter filter).

key.name: cursor-scale
key.description: Factor by which the cursor is enlarged when a wiggle is detected.

key.name: restore-delay-ms
key.description: How long the enlarged cursor is held before the shrink animation begins, in milliseconds.

key.name: restore-anim-steps
key.description: Number of steps in the cursor shrink animation.

key.name: restore-anim-step-ms
key.description: Duration of each step in the cursor shrink animation, in milliseconds.
